summary: Verified mobile Settings reachability fix in Layout.jsx. Mobile top bar shows Settings gear icon (data-testid=nav-settings-mobile) between SyncIndicator and theme toggle; navigates to /settings; renders cloud-sync-panel; active state applies text-foreground. Bottom nav retains exactly 5 items (Dashboard/Planned/Calendar/History/Reports) and does NOT include Settings. Desktop sidebar unchanged with all 6 nav items; mobile top bar and bottom nav hidden on desktop (md:hidden).
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts responsive container warnings (width=-1, height=-1) on Dashboard — pre-existing, non-blocking, but worth investigating parent container min-height in charts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile viewport 390x844 works via set_viewport_size. All navigation testids reachable. Cloud sync remains DISABLED (env vars missing) — expected.
